title: Tiny Snails!
description: A snail mod made in 8 minutes and 24 seconds.
body:
Welcome to tiny snails! It adds snails. What more could you want? Snails drop slimeballs and are more common than slimes, meaning they are an easy way to harvest slimeballs! You can even keep one as a pet! If you like snails then this mod is 100% for you!

Features list

-Snail, drops slimeballs and is more common than slimes

-Advancement for killing a snail

Mod was made in 8 minutes and 24 seconds
